name: medicare-medication-reminder-system
description: Pharmacy Medication Reminder System — Full Stack Monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo '✅ All packages installed. Run npm run dev to start.'
